html:
Exclusive to:

GenericSome KelpLots of Kelp

“Speeds up the respawning of Merm in Craftsmerm Houses, Merm Flort-ifications and Leaky Shacks.

Can be used to call nearby merm to come eat the kelp and follow the Merm who summoned them.”

-For Communal Kelp Dish and Superior Communal Kelp Dish

The Communal Kelp Dish is a special structure that can be crafted by Wurt with the "Community Feeder I" skill and can only be placed on Marsh Turf. All Craftsmerm Houses and Merm Flort-ifications within its range will respawn Merms faster. It has 4 slots, each able to hold 1 Kelp Fronds. Every Kelp Fronds in the Communal Kelp Dish will make Merms respawn faster by 8%, up to a maximum of 32% with all slots filled. It can be interacted with in order to call nearby Merms to eat the kelp. Each Merm will eat 1 Kelp Fronds from it and start following you. Hitting the structure with a Hammer will drop all Kelp Fronds.

Communal Kelp Dish can be filled with Kelp Fronds only by Wurt or player with Clever Disguise. But a player with Clever Disguise cannot interact with the Communal Kelp Dish to gather Merms.

Superior Communal Kelp Dish

GenericSome KelpLots of Kelp

The Superior Communal Kelp Dish is a special structure that can be crafted only by Wurt with the "Community Feeder II" skill and it can only be placed in Marsh Turf. It works similar to the common Communal Kelp Dish. All Craftsmerm Houses and Merm Flort-ifications within its range will respawn Merms faster. It has 6 slots, each able to hold 1 Kelp Fronds. Every Kelp Fronds in the Superior Communal Kelp Dish will make Merms respawn faster by 8%, up to a maximum of 48% with all slots filled. It can be used by Wurt with the "Community Feeder II" skill to gather Merms. It can be interacted with in order to call nearby Merms to eat the kelp. Each Merm will eat 1 Kelp Fronds from it and start following you. Hitting the structure with a Hammer will drop all Kelp Fronds.

Superior Communal Kelp Dish can be filled with Kelp Fronds only by Wurt or player with Clever Disguise. But a player with Clever Disguise cannot interact with the Superior Communal Kelp Dish to gather Merms.

Tips

  • You can first build the Communal Kelp Dish or Superior Communal Kelp Dish with the necessary skills, and then respawn your Wurt at the Celestial Portal with other skills selected. This will allow you to fill this structure with Kelp Fronds without the "Community Feeder I" or "Community Feeder II" skills.

Gallery

  • Communal Kelp Dish Burnt
  • Superior Communal Kelp Dish Burnt
  • Communal Kelp Dish concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.
Craftable ItemsStructures

Exclusive to:
Communal Kelp Dish
Empty
1
2
3
4
"A little kelp can go a long way."
Object Info
Can be Burned
Crafting
×2 ×2 ( only)
Filters
(for ).
Miscellaneous
"offering_pot"
GenericSome KelpLots of Kelp
“It's so sad and kelp-less...”
–Wilson, Generic
“Well, what am I supposed to do about it?”
–Willow, Generic
“Bowl is empty? Poor fish men must be hungry...”
–Wolfgang, Generic
“Empty.”
–Wendy, Generic
“SLIMY BIOFUEL DEPOSITORY. STATUS: EMPTY”
–WX-78, Generic
“The merms are known for their love of kelp.”
–Wickerbottom, Generic
“Let's give it a little greenery, eh?”
–Woodie, Generic
“The fishheads are out of salad.”
–Maxwell, Generic
“The fish beasts hunger för that vile weed öf the sea.”
–Wigfrid, Generic
“They need kelp!”
–Webber, Generic
“Nothing sadder than an empty dish!”
–Warly, Generic
“Empty. Aww...”
–Wormwood, Generic
“Shucks, I can't just leave it empty!”
–Winona, Generic
“A saddening scarcity of seaweed, I see.”
–Wortox, Generic
“Hey!! There no sea snacks in here!”
–Wurt, Generic
“Need a little kelp? Heh. Good one, Walter.”
–Walter, Generic
“Are they incapable of gathering their own kelp?”
–Wanda, Generic
“I think I could fit some more kelp in there.”
–Wilson, Some Kelp
“Greedy, aren't we?”
–Willow, Some Kelp
“Wolfgang will find more sea spinach to fill their bellies!”
–Wolfgang, Some Kelp
“The merms are in an endless cycle of feeding. Give them more.”
–Wendy, Some Kelp
“THE UNGRATEFUL ORGANICS STILL WANT MORE”
–WX-78, Some Kelp
“A little more. They are not yet satiated.”
–Wickerbottom, Some Kelp
“I think I could pile on a little more.”
–Woodie, Some Kelp
“Not enough? Where does it end?”
–Maxwell, Some Kelp
“Möre? They want möre?!”
–Wigfrid, Some Kelp
“We can get more!”
–Webber, Some Kelp
“Feast, my fishy friends! Plenty more where that came from.”
–Warly, Some Kelp
“Sea friends make Glub Glub Men happy”
–Wormwood, Some Kelp
“I should add a little more, wouldn't want them to run out.”
–Winona, Some Kelp
“Would it be such a chore to add some more?”
–Wortox, Some Kelp
“Not full yet, need more yummies!”
–Wurt, Some Kelp
“More kelp is on the way! Get it, Woby?”
–Walter, Some Kelp
“How much kelp do they need?”
–Wanda, Some Kelp
“Kelpious amounts of seaweed!”
–Wilson, Lots of Kelp
“It's full already!”
–Willow, Lots of Kelp
“Eat, fish men! Grow big and strong like Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang, Lots of Kelp
“So even the merms have their limits.”
–Wendy, Lots of Kelp
“LET THEM EAT KELP”
–WX-78, Lots of Kelp
“It's sure to topple if we pile on any more.”
–Wickerbottom, Lots of Kelp
“That should do it!”
–Woodie, Lots of Kelp
“Satisfied?”
–Maxwell, Lots of Kelp
“'Tis enöugh tö görge themselves tö the gills!”
–Wigfrid, Lots of Kelp
“That's a lot of kelp!”
–Webber, Lots of Kelp
“That will do for now.”
–Warly, Lots of Kelp
“All full!”
–Wormwood, Lots of Kelp
“That should keep'em well fed.”
–Winona, Lots of Kelp
“Heaping helpings of kelp!”
–Wortox, Lots of Kelp
“Enough for all Mermfolk to share, florp.”
–Wurt, Lots of Kelp
“This is kelpful. Hah! Where are you getting this stuff, Walter?”
–Walter, Lots of Kelp
“That must be enough.”
–Wanda, Lots of Kelp
“Speeds up the respawning of Merm in Craftsmerm Houses, Merm Flort-ifications and Leaky Shacks.
Can be used to call nearby merm to come eat the kelp and follow the Merm who summoned them.”
